name: X-Golf Broadview Hts
about: X-Golf Broadview Hts is an indoor golf simulator venue that utilizes a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software to provide an accurate and realistic golf experience. It offers seven state-of-the-art simulators available for hourly rental, with pricing varying by time of day and day of week. The venue features a full liquor bar, food service, and hosts corporate events, private parties, leagues, and lessons. It is designed for golfers of all ages and skill levels looking to play, train, or entertain in a modern setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera, laser, and impact sensor technology
Ability to play famous golf courses from around the world, rain or shine
A full bar and food service available to enhance the social experience
Professional instruction from a PGA Professional using V-1 teaching software for swing analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available; specific menu not provided, contact for details

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available on-site if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own full kitchen and liquor bar available for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on an X-Golf Simulator?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. For each additional person in the group, you may need to book an additional hour, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages.
